message:
feat(ingest): Add pane discovery with fingerprinting and lifecycle tracking

- Add PaneFingerprint struct for stable pane identity across restarts
- Add ObservationDecision enum for include/exclude filter results
- Add PaneEntry struct with generation tracking and observation state
- Add DiscoveryDiff struct for change tracking (new/closed/changed/new_generations)
- Extend PaneRegistry with discovery_tick(), filter configuration, and lifecycle tracking
- Add re_evaluate_observation() for dynamic filter changes
- Add 11 comprehensive tests for discovery functionality

Also includes storage.rs audit actions support (from concurrent work).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
